a: A structure that represents the cellular service account to use for starting or joining a conversation.
A type that describes a video or audio conversation.
A type that describes capabilities of a conversation.
Values that describe why a conversation ended.
Another device declined the conversation.
An error occurred while attempting to service the conversation.
Another device joined the conversation.
The remote party explicitly ended the conversation.
The conversation didn’t complete the connection process and was never explicitly ended.
Values that tell the system what happened during a conversation.
Informs that system that conversation successfully connected at a point in time.
Informs that system that a conversation ended at a point in time with a reason.
Informs the system that a conversation has started to connect participants at a point in time.
Updates a conversation’s attributes and capabilities.
Values that describe the current state of a conversation.
The conversation was registered with the system, but it’s not active yet.
Audio and video streams are active and the local participant is able to engage with remote participants.
The setup process of the conversation in progress; for example, establishing audio and video streams.
Participants left the conversation and it’s in the process of ending.
The conversation is no longer active and all audio and video sessions have ended.
Audio and video streams are paused, but may resume.
A type that describes new, changed, or deleted capabilities and attributes of a conversation.
A type that represents an action for a conversation.
A type that describes the current state of a conversation action.
The action finished successfully.
Indicates that the action failed.
The action has been created but hasn’t started.
The action is currently processing.
An interface for managing and providing conversation history.
A message you can observe to receive conversation history updates if your app is the default dialer app.
A structure that describes a recent conversation.
Values that indicate whether a conversation was initiated or received.

The conversation was connected on this device.
The receving participant didn’t answer the incoming conversation.
The conversation’s status is unknown.

Methods for managing conversations and receiving VoIP conversation updates.
An action that removes the local participant from a conversation and stops all audio and video streams.
A way to reach a participant, such as a phone number or email address.

An email address.

A phone number.

An action that merges two separate conversations into one conversation.
An action that mutes or unmutes a conversation.

t: Preparing your app to be the default dialer app
